content:
{"cards": [{"name": "Archive of Echoes", "mana_cost": "{3}{U}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Choose one —
• Draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.
• Look at the top seven cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.", "flavor_text": "Knowledge comes in many forms, but wisdom lies in choosing the right one.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Modal sorcery testing choice structure and blue's card selection identity. First mode is immediate card advantage but requires hand management. Second mode is pure selection without immediate advantage but better long-term setup. Costed at 4 mana to be powerful but not oppressive, requiring significant investment for the effect."}, {"name": "Grasp of Decay", "mana_cost": "{1}{B}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Destroy target creature with mana value 3 or less.", "flavor_text": "Death finds the weak first.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Conditional creature removal at common following black's color pie. More efficient than Murder but restricted by mana value to maintain balance. The restriction makes it a reasonable common by limiting late-game impact while providing early-game utility. Tests targeting language with conditional restrictions."}, {"name": "Carrion Seeker", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Creature — Zombie Scout", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, mill two cards.
Whenever a creature card is put into your graveyard from anywhere, ~ gets +1/+0 until end of turn.", "flavor_text": null, "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Multiability creature combining ETB trigger with graveyard synergy. The mill provides immediate value and potential fuel for the second ability. Stats are baseline 2/2 for 3 mana, with upside from abilities. Tests both entering triggers and zone-change triggers, fitting black's graveyard-as-resource theme."}, {"name": "Vorthak, Death's Herald", "mana_cost": "{3}{B}{B}{B}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Legendary Creature — Demon", "oracle_text": "Flying, menace
When ~ enters, destroy all non-Demon creatures.
At the beginning of your upkeep, each opponent loses life equal to the number of creatures in all graveyards.", "flavor_text": null, "power": "6", "toughness": "6", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Mythic legendary demon with massive board impact. Triple black cost ensures heavy color commitment. Flying and menace provide evasion fitting the creature type. Board wipe on entry creates dramatic game state change, while upkeep trigger provides ongoing pressure that scales with creature deaths. 6/6 body matches the mana investment and mythic rarity."}, {"name": "Searing Strike", "mana_cost": "{R}", "cmc": 1, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "~ deals 2 damage to target creature or planeswalker.", "flavor_text": "Precision and power in perfect harmony.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Efficient red burn spell at common, deliberately less powerful than Lightning Bolt to avoid power creep. 2 damage for 1 mana is strong but balanced by not hitting players. Tests damage assignment wording and targeting restrictions. Fits red's identity of direct damage while being appropriately costed for common rarity."}]}
